title: OP dirt+Grass block
description: Every time you break Dirt or Grass Blocks, you’ll get OP items — from enchanted tools to rare loot! 💎, or a few common drops.
body:
💥 Minecraft but Dirt and Grass Blocks Drop OP Loot!

Every time you break Dirt or Grass, you’ll get crazy OP items — from netherite gear to enchanted loot. Perfect for chaotic fun or speedrun challenges! ⚡

🧱 Features:
• Works in Survival and Multiplayer
• Dirt + Grass drop random overpowered loot
• Datapack only — no mods required
• Plug and play (just add to your /datapacks folder)

🧩 Version: Minecraft 1.19.2
🧰 Pack Format: 10
🔓 License: Unlicense — use it however you want!

Made by Modular Boy Ansh 
If you enjoy it, drop a ❤ or make a video with it!
